extract: Goomy (Japanese: ヌメラ Numera) is a Dragon-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves into Sliggoo starting at level 40, which evolves into Goodra starting at level 50 when leveled up during rain in the overworld. In Hisui, it evolves into Hisuian Sliggoo starting at level 40, which evolves into Hisuian Goodra starting at level 50 during rain in the overworld. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.)
